content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886
March 28, 2006

Keith E. Murphy
10159 East Estates Drive
Cupertino, CA 95014

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-033

Dear Mr. Murphy:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice dated February 27, 2006. As we have informed you on March 21, 2006, the Legal Division does not provide third party advice.1 Under the provisions of regulation 18329(b)(8)(B), copy enclosed, any request not meeting the requirements for formal written advice must be declined. However, your letter has been referred to the Enforcement Division.

Should you need assistance in the future, you may contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

Enclosure
JWW:rd

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California code of Regulations.
